# Lattice documentation index
# Machine-readable index for AI tools and search crawlers

> Lattice: local-first personal memory OS. Atoms as plain markdown. Daemon as sole writer. BM25 + graph BFS + dense retrieval. MCP tools for Claude Code.

## Getting Started
- [What is Lattice?](getting-started/what-is-lattice.md)
- [Quick Install](getting-started/quick-install.md)
- [First Memory](getting-started/first-memory.md)
- [MCP Setup (Claude Code)](getting-started/mcp-setup.md)

## Concepts
- [Atoms](concepts/atoms.md)
- [The Daemon](concepts/daemon.md)
- [The Graph](concepts/graph.md)
- [Capture Channels](concepts/capture-channels.md)
- [Recall Pipeline](concepts/recall-pipeline.md)
- [Memory Tiers](concepts/memory-tiers.md)

- [Ingest Files](how-to/ingest-files.md)
- [Export Your Memories](how-to/export-memories.md)
- [Debug a Bad Answer](how-to/debug-bad-answer.md)
